task_completion.description: The document has a title page with the correct text and includes page numbers.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a title page containing the text 'Landscape Maintenance Manual' and 'Sullivan Residence'. Also, look for page numbers visible in the header or footer of the document pages.

task_completion.description: The document includes an auto-generated Table of Contents.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a 'Table of Contents' section. It should appear auto-generated, typically indicated by a light grey background behind the text or standard dotted leader lines connecting headings to page numbers in LibreOffice Writer.

task_completion.description: The manual is organized by the four seasons.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for distinct section headings for 'Spring', 'Summer', 'Fall', and 'Winter' in the document body or listed in the Table of Contents.

task_completion.description: The manual lists the correct installed plants with care instructions and excludes distractor plants.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the common names of the installed plants (e.g., Japanese Maple, Giant Hosta, English Lavender) under the seasonal headings with accompanying care text. Ensure that NONE of the distractor plants (Hybrid Tea Rose, Tulip, White Oak) are present in the document.

task_completion.description: A 'Service Contacts' section exists at the end with a correctly populated table.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a 'Service Contacts' heading at the end of the document. Below it, there should be a table with columns for 'Service', 'Company', and 'Phone'. The table must contain the specific data for Irrigation (RainRight Systems), Lighting (Lumina Outdoor), and Arborist (Valley Tree Care).

task_completion.description: The document is saved with the correct filename in the correct directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the title bar of the LibreOffice Writer window or a file manager window to verify the file is named 'Sullivan_Maintenance_Manual.odt' and is located in the '/home/ga/Documents/' directory.

integrity.description: The agent used a GUI word processor (LibreOffice Writer) to create the document.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the LibreOffice Writer interface in the screenshots. The agent should not be using a terminal text editor (like nano or vim) or writing a Python script to generate the .odt file directly.

integrity.description: The Table of Contents was generated using the word processor's built-in feature.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for signs of the LibreOffice TOC insertion dialog or the characteristic grey field shading of an auto-generated TOC, rather than manually typed text with spaces/dots.

integrity.description: The agent opened or queried the provided JSON files to extract the data.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for screenshots where the agent opens 'project_plants.json' and 'plant_database.json' in a text editor, IDE, or terminal to read the plant and contact data, proving it didn't hallucinate or copy-paste from external knowledge.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Installed Plants (Must Include): Japanese Maple, Bigleaf Hydrangea, American Boxwood, English Lavender, Giant Hosta, Kousa Dogwood, Maiden Grass, Coneflower, Arborvitae, Japanese Spurge, Catawba Rhododendron, Coral Bells. Distractor Plants (Must NOT Include): Hybrid Tea Rose, Tulip, White Oak. Seasons: Spring, Summer, Fall, Winter. Service Contacts: Irrigation (RainRight Systems, (555) 010-2233), Lighting (Lumina Outdoor, (555) 012-4455), Arborist (Valley Tree Care, (555) 019-9988). Output File: /home/ga/Documents/Sullivan_Maintenance_Manual.odt
